abilities.name: Aegis
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Whiteout
abilities.text: Once per activation. When targeting models or terrain pieces on the enemy table half, this model receives a (+).

actions.name: Glacier's Reach
actions.effects: Target gains a Slow token and is moved up to 4".

actions.name: Glacial Volley
actions.effects: Deal 1 damage to a different enemy within 4" of the target.

triggers.name: Frosted Veins
triggers.text: Models damaged by this action gain a Numb token.

triggers.name: Frozen Trophy
triggers.text: Once per activation. Target gains a Frozen Solid token.

triggers.name: Revelation
triggers.text: This model gains an Insight token.

actions.name: Frozen Runes
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a piece of terrain in range. Choose one of the following:
actions.effects:
Claimstone Rite: Make a Scheme marker within range that is within 1" of the target.
Glyph of Passage: Move an ally in LoS up to 4" toward the target.
Rune of Renewal: Allies within 1" of the target heal 1.
Sigil of Suffering: Enemy models within 1" of the target are dealt 1 damage.
